question: Show ids for orders including both "Pride and Prejudice" and "The Little Prince".
sql: SELECT IdOrder FROM Books_Order WHERE ISBN IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Book WHERE Title = 'Pride and Prejudice') AND IdOrder IN (SELECT IdOrder FROM Books_Order WHERE ISBN IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Book WHERE Title = 'The Little Prince')) GROUP BY IdOrder HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT ISBN) = 2;

back_translation.intent: 查询同时包含《Pride and Prejudice》和《The Little Prince》两本书的订单ID
filters: ISBN IN (SELECT ISBN FROM Book WHERE Title = 'Pride and Prejudice' OR Title = 'The Little Prince')

semantic.reason: 过滤条件错误使用OR逻辑，应要求订单同时包含两本书而非任选其一。此外，缺少HAVING子句确保两本书的存在，COUNT(DISTINCT ISBN)聚合函数与原始问题需求不符
